tasks.label: Laravel API Smoke
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}' && echo "`n---PROFILE---`n" && for /f "tokens=2 delims=:,\" " %a in ('curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}' ^| findstr /c:"access"') do @set TOKEN=%a && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/profile/ -H "Authorization: Bearer %TOKEN%"

tasks.label: Laravel Auth Smoke Bash
tasks.command: response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}'); echo "$response"; token=$(printf '%s' "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"access"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo '---PROFILE---'; if [ -n "$token" ]; then curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/profile/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token"; else echo 'NO_TOKEN'; fi

tasks.label: Laravel Unauthorized Checks
tasks.command:
printf 'profile=' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/profile/ && printf '
users=' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/users/ && printf '
orders=' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/orders/ && printf '
warranties=' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranties/ && printf '
'

tasks.label: Laravel Core API Verification
tasks.command: response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}'); token=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo $d["access"] ?? "";' <<< "$response"); phone=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo $d["user"]["phone"] ?? "";' <<< "$response"); email=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo $d["user"]["email"] ?? "";' <<< "$response"); echo "LOGIN=$( [ -n "$token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; echo "PROFILE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/profile/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; otp_response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/otp/send/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"phone":"'"$phone"'"}'); otp=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo $d["otp"] ?? "";' <<< "$otp_response"); echo "OTP_SEND=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo isset($d["otp"]) ? "PASS" : "FAIL";' <<< "$otp_response")"; verify_response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/otp/verify/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"phone":"'"$phone"'","otp":"'"$otp"'"}'); echo "OTP_VERIFY=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo isset($d["access"]) ? "PASS" : "FAIL";' <<< "$verify_response")"; reset_response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/password-reset/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"'"$email"'"}'); reset_token=$(php -r '$d=json_decode(stream_get_contents(STDIN), true); echo $d["reset_token"] ?? "";' <<< "$reset_response"); echo "PASSWORD_RESET=$( [ -n "$reset_token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; echo "USERS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/users/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "MODELS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/models/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "CATEGORIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/categories/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "PRODUCTS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/products/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ACCESSORIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/accessories/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "SERIALS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/serials/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ORDERS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/orders/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "WARRANTIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranties/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "CLAIMS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranty-claims/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "NOTIFICATIONS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/notifications/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_METRICS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/metrics/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_ROLES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/roles/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_PERMISSIONS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/permissions/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_STAFF=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/staff/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"

tasks.label: Laravel Login Check
tasks.command: response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}'); echo "$response"; token=$(printf '%s' "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"access"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "TOKEN_PRESENT=$( [ -n "$token" ] && echo YES || echo NO )"

tasks.label: Laravel Core API Verification Clean
tasks.command: response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}'); token=$(printf '%s' "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"access":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); phone=$(printf '%s' "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"phone":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); email=$(printf '%s' "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"email":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "LOGIN=$( [ -n "$token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; echo "PROFILE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/profile/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; otp_response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/otp/send/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"phone":"'"$phone"'"}'); otp=$(printf '%s' "$otp_response" | sed -n 's/.*"otp":\([0-9]*\).*/\1/p'); echo "OTP_SEND=$( [ -n "$otp" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; verify_response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/otp/verify/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"phone":"'"$phone"'","otp":"'"$otp"'"}'); verify_token=$(printf '%s' "$verify_response" | sed -n 's/.*"access":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "OTP_VERIFY=$( [ -n "$verify_token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; reset_response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/password-reset/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"'"$email"'"}'); reset_token=$(printf '%s' "$reset_response" | sed -n 's/.*"reset_token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "PASSWORD_RESET=$( [ -n "$reset_token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; echo "USERS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/users/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "MODELS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/models/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "CATEGORIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/categories/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "PRODUCTS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/products/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ACCESSORIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/accessories/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "SERIALS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/serials/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ORDERS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/orders/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "WARRANTIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranties/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "CLAIMS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranty-claims/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "NOTIFICATIONS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/notifications/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_METRICS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/metrics/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_ROLES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/roles/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_PERMISSIONS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/permissions/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_STAFF=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/staff/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"

tasks.label: Laravel Remaining Endpoint Checks
tasks.command: response=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}'); token=$(printf '%s' "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"access":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "CATEGORIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/categories/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "PRODUCTS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/products/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ACCESSORIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/accessories/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "SERIALS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/inventory/serials/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ORDERS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/orders/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "WARRANTIES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranties/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "CLAIMS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranty-claims/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "NOTIFICATIONS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/notifications/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_METRICS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/metrics/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_ROLES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/roles/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_PERMISSIONS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/permissions/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"; echo "ADMIN_STAFF=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/staff/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token")"

tasks.label: Laravel Extra Flow Checks
tasks.command: stamp=$(date +%s); email="temp${stamp}@example.com"; phone="9${stamp: -9}"; reg=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/register/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"'"$email"'","password":"password123","first_name":"Temp","last_name":"User","phone":"'"$phone"'"}'); reg_code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/register/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"dup-'"$email"'","password":"password123","first_name":"Temp","last_name":"User","phone":"1'"$phone"'"}'); reg_token=$(printf '%s' "$reg" | sed -n 's/.*"access":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "REGISTER=$( [ -n "$reg_token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; reset=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/password-reset/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"'"$email"'"}'); reset_token=$(printf '%s' "$reset" | sed -n 's/.*"reset_token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); confirm_code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/password-reset/confirm/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"reset_token":"'"$reset_token"'","password":"newpassword123"}'); echo "PASSWORD_RESET_CONFIRM=$confirm_code"; login2=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"'"$email"'","password":"newpassword123"}'); login2_token=$(printf '%s' "$login2" | sed -n 's/.*"access":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "LOGIN_AFTER_RESET=$( [ -n "$login2_token" ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL )"; admin=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/auth/login/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@lithovolt.com","password":"password123"}'); admin_token=$(printf '%s' "$admin" | sed -n 's/.*"access":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo "WARRANTY_VERIFY=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/warranties/verify/TEST-SERIAL/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $admin_token")"; echo "ADMIN_DASHBOARD=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/admin/dashboard/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $admin_token")"
